site.title: AI Image Metadata Viewer
site.tagline: Drop a PNG or JPEG generated by Stable Diffusion, ComfyUI, NovelAI, or Midjourney to instantly see the prompt, model, sampler, seed, and more.
site.footer: All parsing happens locally in your browser. No uploads, no tracking of file contents.

dropzone.hint: PNG · JPEG · WebP · ⌘V to paste · Esc to clear
dropzone.formats: PNG · JPEG · WebP — Stable Diffusion, ComfyUI, NovelAI, Midjourney

metadata.noMetadata: No AI metadata found in this image. It may have been re-saved (which strips metadata) or generated by a tool that doesn't embed it.

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Stored in your browser only — clearing site data will erase this list.
history.emptyCta: ← Drop an image to get started
history.confirmClear: Clear all history? This can't be undone.

hero.tagline: Read the prompt, model, sampler, seed, LoRAs and ComfyUI workflow embedded in PNGs and JPEGs from Stable Diffusion, ComfyUI, NovelAI, and Midjourney — entirely in your browser.

preview.title: Prompts
preview.body: Positive, negative, with LoRAs and embeddings detected.

preview.title: Parameters
preview.body: Model, sampler, seed, steps, CFG, size — copy any field.

preview.title: Workflow
preview.body: ComfyUI: download the full executable workflow JSON.

automatic1111-metadata-viewer.intro: Read the prompt, negative prompt, sampler, seed, model hash, LoRAs, and every other parameter that AUTOMATIC1111 (and Forge) embed in the PNG tEXt chunk named "parameters". Drag a generated image below to inspect it locally.
fields: Positive and negative prompt (with LoRA / embedding tokens called out)
Sampler, scheduler, steps, CFG scale, denoising strength
Any extra fields the WebUI added (preserved verbatim)

faq.q: Why does my image have no metadata?
faq.a: Re-saving a PNG through most editors (Photoshop, online compressors, social platforms) strips the tEXt chunks. Only the original file from the WebUI keeps the data.
No. Parsing runs entirely in your browser using a pure JavaScript PNG chunk reader.

comfyui-workflow-extractor.intro: Pull the full ComfyUI workflow JSON out of an exported PNG, plus a flat summary of model, sampler, seed, prompts, and LoRAs. Drag a ComfyUI image below to extract everything locally.
fields: Editor workflow JSON (with node positions) — one-click download
Executable prompt graph — model, samplers, prompts, LoRA chains
Positive vs. negative prompts inferred from KSampler wiring

faq.q: Can I re-import the workflow into ComfyUI?
faq.a: Yes. The downloaded JSON is the same one ComfyUI saves; drag it onto the ComfyUI canvas to load it.

faq.q: Why are some fields missing for SDXL / Flux nodes?
faq.a: Custom nodes use non-standard input names; we only resolve the most common ones (KSampler, CheckpointLoaderSimple, LoraLoader, etc.).

novelai-prompt-extractor.intro: Read the prompt, undesired-content (uc), sampler, seed, and other parameters that NovelAI embeds in PNG tEXt chunks (Description, Comment, Software). Drag a NovelAI image below.
fields: Negative prompt / uc (from the Comment JSON)
Steps, scale (CFG), seed, sampler, noise schedule
Image size and any other Comment fields preserved as extras

faq.q: What if the image was downloaded with metadata stripped?
faq.a: NovelAI's own download keeps the metadata. Sharing through Discord or Twitter usually removes it.
